message:
Eliminate O(n²) in preprocess_json5 and tapeDeepEqualUnordered

preprocess_json5: replace backward comma scan with O(1) tracked
last_comma_out_pos. tapeDeepEqualUnordered: replace O(n²) linear
scan + 256-key bitmask cap with O(n log n) sorted binary search,
removing the size limit entirely.
